content: llama-server structured output (current README): response_format {'type':'json_object'} and {'type':'json_schema','schema':{...}} -- note non-OpenAI nesting: schema sits at top level, NOT under json_schema.json_schema.schema (historical issues #10732, #11847). Also non-standard 'json_schema' and 'grammar' (GBNF) request fields; json_schema+grammar together is an error. External $refs unsupported. Always Pydantic-validate output regardless of grammar constraint.
